channel.title: enaqx/awesome-react Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: enaqx/awesome-react Apr 26th - May 2nd, 2021
item.description:
React Native Libraries

  • uncompress-react-nativestars27 - Simple library to decompress files .zip, .rar, .cbz, .cbr in React Native.

item.title: enaqx/awesome-react Apr 19th - Apr 25th, 2021
item.description:
Another Awesome Lists

  • React/Redux Linksstars20.5k

    • Redux Tutorials

  • Redux Essentials
  • Redux Fundamentals
  • Fundamentals of Redux Course from Dan Abramov
    • React Libraries
  • preact - Fast 3kb React alternative with the same ES6 API.
  • reapopstars1.2k - A simple and customizable React notifications system
    • React State Management
  • hookstatestars750 - The simple but very powerful and incredibly fast state management for React that is based on hooks
  • effectorstars3.2k - Fast and powerful reactive state manager
  • reactnstars1.9k - React, but with built-in global state management
  • redux - Predictable State Container for JavaScript Apps
  • mobxstars23.7k - Simple, scalable state management
  • react-querystars19.8k
  • flux - Application architecture for building user interfaces
  • recoilstars12.8k - Experimental state management library for React apps
  • xstate-react - State machines and statecharts for the modern web
  • zustandstars8.1k - Bear necessities for state management in React
  • easy-peasystars4.2k - Vegetarian friendly state for React
    • Data Managing
  • immerstars20.1k - Create the next immutable state by mutating the current one
  • immutable-jsstars31k - Immutable Data Collections for Javascript
  • baobabstars3.1k - JavaScript & TypeScript persistent and optionally immutable data tree with cursors
  • WatermelonDBstars7.5k - 🍉 Reactive & asynchronous database for powerful React and React Native apps ⚡️

    • React Native Boilerplates

  • Create React Native Appstars12.7k - Create React Native apps that run on iOS, Android, and web

    • Redux General Resources

  • Redux GitHubstars55.9k

    • Redux Tools

  • react-reduxstars20.9k - Official React bindings for Redux
  • redux-devtoolsstars11.9k - DevTools for Redux with hot reloading, action replay, and customizable UI
  • redux-thunkstars16.3k - Thunk middleware for redux
  • connected-react-routerstars4.5k - A Redux binding for React Router
  • redux-formstars12.5k - A Higher Order Component using react-redux to keep form state
  • normalizrstars20.1k - Normalizes nested JSON according to a schema

    • GraphQL General Resources

  • GraphQL Specificationstars13.3k

    • GraphQL Tools

  • graphql-jsstars17.6k - A reference implementation of GraphQL for JavaScript
  • express-graphqlstars5.9k - Create a GraphQL HTTP server with Express
  • Apollo - Industry-standard GraphQL implementation

    • GraphQL Implementations

  • graphql-rubystars4.7k - Ruby implementation of GraphQL
  • graphql-javastars4.9k - GraphQL Java implementation
  • graphenestars6.6k - GraphQL framework for Python
  • graphql-gostars7.6k - GraphQL for Go
  • juniperstars3.7k - GraphQL server library for Rust

    • Database Integration

  • Hasura - Instant GraphQL for all your data
  • Prisma - Next-generation ORM

item.title: enaqx/awesome-react Apr 12th - Apr 18th, 2021
item.description:
React Hooks
  • Awesome React Hooksstars6.7k
  • Thinking in React Hooks
  • React Hooks Video Tutorial
    • Forms
  • formikstars27.2k - Build forms in React, without the tears
  • react-hook-formstars20.6k - React Hooks for forms validation
  • react-final-formstars6.5k - High performance subscription-based form state management for React
  • unformstars4.2k - Performance-focused API for React forms
  • formilystars3.8k - Alibaba Group Unified Form Solution
  • uniformsstars1.4k - A React library for building forms from any schema
  • formsy-reactstars713 - A form input builder and validator for React
  • react-formalstars500 - Sophisticated HTML form management for React
    • React General Tutorials
  • React Official Tutorial

item.title: enaqx/awesome-react Apr 5th - Apr 11th, 2021
item.description:
React Renderers
  • react-three-fiberstars13.2k - A React renderer for Three.js
  • react-pdfstars9.3k - Create PDF files using React
  • react-blessedstars4.1k - A React renderer for blessed terminal interface library
  • react-sketchappstars14.8k - Render React components to Sketch
  • react-figmastars1.5k - A React renderer for Figma
  • remotionstars7k - Create videos programmatically in React
    • React Starter Kits and Toolchains
  • Razzle - Build production ready React applications. Razzle is toolchain for modern static and dynamic websites and web applications
  • Neutrino React Preset - @neutrinojs/react is a Neutrino preset that supports building React web applications
    • React Component Libraries
  • ant-designstars6.5k - A design system with values of Nature and Determinacy
  • chakra-uistars17.6k - Simple, Modular & Accessible UI Components for your React Applications
  • euistars2.7k - Elastic UI Framework
  • react-spectrumstars4.6k - Adobe's collection of libraries and tools that help you build adaptive, accessible, and robust user experiences
  • ring-uistars2.6k - JetBrains Web UI components
  • bumbag-uistars838 - Build accessible & themeable React applications with your Bumbag
    • React Awesome Components
  • react-popperstars2k - Position tooltips and popovers in an elegant, performant manner
  • react-tsparticlesstars1.8k - Easily create highly customizable particles animations
  • react-springstars20.3k - Spring-physics based animation library for React applications
  • framer-motionstars11.1k - A React library to power production-ready animations
  • react-cookiestars2k - Universal cookies for React
  • react-slickstars9.5k - Carousel component built with React
  • react-gtm-modulestars380 - Google Tag Manager Module for React
  • react-device-detectstars1.2k - Detect device for React
  • react-colorfulstars1.2k - A tiny (2,5 KB), dependency-free, fast and accessible color picker component
  • react-modalstars6.3k - Accessible modal dialog component for React
  • cleave.jsstars16.6k - Format input text content when you are typing
  • react-fontawesomestars3.4k - Font Awesome 5 React component
    • Charts
  • vxstars13.2k - Visualization components
  • victorystars8.9k - A collection of composable React components for building interactive data visualizations
  • react-visstars7.8k - Data Visualization Components
  • rechartsstars16.3k - Redefined chart library built with React and D3
  • nivostars8.7k - Provides a rich set of data visualization components, built on top of the D3 and React libraries
  • echarts-for-reactstars3.2k - Apache ECharts components for React wrapper
  • react-apexchartsstars708 - React Component for ApexCharts
  • chartifystars673 - React plugin for building charts using CSS

item.title: enaqx/awesome-react Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2021
item.description:
React Libraries
  • react-uploadystars400 - Modern file-upload components & hooks for React.
  • react-aria - Adobe's library of React Hooks that provides accessible UI primitives for your design system
    • React Routing
  • wouterstars3.1k - A minimalist-friendly ~1.3KB routing library
    • React Starter Kits and Toolchains
  • tsdx - Zero-config CLI for TypeScript package development

    • React Native Libraries

  • react-native-react-bridgestars22 - A toolset to run React web app in React Native and handle communication between them.

item.title: enaqx/awesome-react Feb 8th - Feb 14th, 2021
item.description:
React Starter Kits and Toolchains
  • create-react-appstars87.8k - Set up a modern Web app by running one command
  • react-starter-kitstars20.7k - Isomorphic Web app boilerplate
  • create-react-librarystars4.2k - CLI for creating reusable, modern React libraries using Rollup and create-react-app.
    • Autocomplete
  • react-autocomplete by @racktstars2.1k - WAI-ARIA compliant React autocomplete (Archived, read-only)
    • Maps
  • google-maps-reactstars1.5k - A declarative Google Map React component using React, lazy-loading dependencies, current-location finder and a test-driven approach by the Fullstack React team.

    • Redux Tools

  • reselectstars17.9k - Selector library for Redux
  • redux-sagastars21.6k - An alternative side effect model for Redux apps

    • Redux Tutorials

  • Building React Applications with Idiomatic Redux

    • GraphQL Tools

  • GraphQL Playground - GraphQL IDE for better development workflowsstars7.2k

    • GraphQL Implementations

  • sangriastars1.8k - Scala GraphQL client and server library

    • Relay General Resources

  • Relay Offical Site

item.title: enaqx/awesome-react Feb 1st - Feb 7th, 2021
item.description:

  • Plasmic - Powerful design tool for building your React components visually.

    • React Native Sample Apps

  • Bus Timetablestars13

item.title: enaqx/awesome-react Jan 25th - Jan 31st, 2021
item.description:
React Development Tools
  • Divjoy - React codebase and UI generator to speed up development (paid)
    • Autocomplete
  • downshiftstars9.5k - 🏎 Primitives to build simple, flexible, WAI-ARIA compliant enhanced input React components

item.title: enaqx/awesome-react Jan 11th - Jan 17th, 2021
item.description:
React Component Libraries
  • Fluent UIstars11.3k - A set of React components for building Microsoft web experiences
  • evergreenstars10.7k - Evergreen React UI Framework by Segment
  • grommetstars7.2k - A react-based framework that provides accessibility, modularity, responsiveness, and theming in a tidy package
    • React Libraries
  • react-border-wrapperstars147 - A wrapper for placing elements along div borders in React.
  • react-magicstars856 - Automatically AJAXify plain HTML with the power of React
  • react-toolboxstars8.7k - A set of React components implementing Google's Material Design specification
  • tcomb-reactstars202 - Library allowing you to check all the props of your React components
  • react-responsivestars5.5k - Media queries in react for responsive design
  • riotjsstars14.5k - A React-like, 3.5KB user interface library
  • Maple.jsstars426 - Bringing the concept of web-components to React
  • react-i13nstars331 - A performant, scalable and pluggable approach to instrumenting your React application
  • react-iconsstars6.3k - svg react icons of popular icon packs
  • Keostars224 - Plain functions for a more functional Deku approach to creating React components, with functional goodies such as pipe, memoize, etc...
  • Bitstars13.4k - A virtual repository for managing and using react and other web components across applications
  • AtlasKit - Atlassian's React UI library
  • ReactiveSearchstars4.4k - UI components library for Elasticsearch
  • Slatestars20.5k - A completely customizable framework for building rich text editors.
  • react-json-schemastars131 - Construct React elements from JSON by mapping JSON definitions to React components that you expose.
  • react-lodashstars309 - Lodash as React components
  • react-helmetstars15.1k - A document head manager for React
  • react-desktopstars9.1k - OS X and Windows UI components built with React
    • React Integration
  • omstars6.7k - ClojureScript interface
  • Reagentstars4.2k - A minimalistic ClojureScript interface to React.js
  • ngReactstars2.6k - React Components in Angular
  • coffee-react-transformstars437 - Provides React JSX support for Coffeescript
  • sprockets-coffee-reactstars84 - Sprockets preprocessor for CJSX
  • react-kupstars21 - A simple, non-intrusive alternative to jsx for coffeescript
  • turbo-reactstars272 - Combine Turbolinks and React to apply DOM diffs
  • react-baconstars117 - A little module for using React with Bacon.js
  • msxstars371 - React's JSX Transformer, tweaked to output calls to Mithril
  • react-backbonestars132 - Backbone-aware mixins for react
  • NestedReactstars79 - transparent integration with Backbone Views and NestedTypes models
  • backbone-reactionstars20 - React, Backbone and then some
  • react.backbonestars847 - Plugin for React to make Backbone migration easier
  • reactbonestars43 - React extensions for Backbone
  • backbone-react-uistars18 - React components for use with backbone and backbone paginator
  • react-eventsstars83 - Declarative managed event bindings for react components
  • react-mixin-managerstars33 - React mixin registration manager
  • react-topcoat by @plaxdanstars36 - Topcoat CSS components built with the React library
  • react-topcoat by @arnemartstars7 - A collection of React components for Topcoat
  • reactdownstars112 - Write React components using markdown syntax
  • react-jadestars555 - Compile Jade to React JavaScript
  • jade-reactstars152 - Compile Jade templates to React.DOM expressions
  • gulp-jade-reactstars23 - Compile Jade templates into React de-sugared JSX with Gulp
  • sbt-reactjsstars78 - React SBT Plugin using npm
  • scalajs-reactstars1.5k - A guilty affair between Scala.js and Facebook's React
  • react-xtagsstars48 - Using React to implement xtags
  • jreactstars168 - React on server-side Java (with Rhino or Nashorn)
  • React.hiccupstars75 - A complete replacement for JSX written in sweet.js
  • react-playstars217 - Rendering React components in the Play Framework with JDK8's Nashorn
  • rx-reactstars620 - Utilities to works with React in a RxJS
  • react-with-distars29 - A hacked prototype of React.js with DI
  • reactfirestars2.5k - ReactJS mixin for easy Firebase integration
  • react-clickdrag-mixinstars53 - ClickDrag mixin for React component
  • react-masonry-mixinstars176 - Standalone mixin for Masonry (@desandro)
  • react-packery-mixinstars21 - Standalone mixin for Packery (Metafizzy)
  • react-dropzonestars8.1k - Simple HTML5 drag-drop zone with React.js.
  • aframe-reactstars5 - A-Frame VR + React
  • react-three-fiberstars13.2k - A react reconciler for threejs (web and react-native)
  • react-threestars1.5k - React bindings to create and control a 3D scene using three.js
  • react-three-rendererstars1.5k - Render into a three.js canvas using React
  • react-threejsstars69 - Simplest bindings between React & Three.js
  • react-masonry-cssstars479 - Fast Masonry layout powered by CSS, dependency free
  • react-captchastars584 - A react.js reCAPTCHA for Google
  • reaptchastars331 - Clean, modern and simple React wrapper for Google reCAPTCHA
  • react-recaptcha-that-worksstars7 - A reCAPTCHA bridge for React that works
    • Forms
  • react-jsonschema-formstars10k - A React component for building Web forms from JSON Schema
    • Autocomplete
  • react-autosuggest by @moroshkostars5.6k - WAI-ARIA compliant React autosuggest component
  • react-autocomplete by @eliseumdsstars99 - Just tasting some ReactJS + RxJS
  • react-autocomplete by @prometheusresearchstars37 - Autocomplete widget based on React
  • instatype by @graglandstars46 - Simple react autocomplete component
  • React Bootstrap Typeaheadstars786 - A React-based typeahead that relies on Bootstrap for styling and was originally inspired by Twitter's typeahead.js.
    • Graphics
  • react-artstars2k - React Bridge to the ART Drawing Library
  • react-canvasstars12.6k - High performance <canvas> rendering for React components
  • react-famousstars168 - Complex 3D animations UI at 60 FPS with Famo.us
  • react-kineticstars67 - HTML5 Canvas via KineticJS using React
  • react-svg-morphstars758 - morph your svg components one into another
  • react-hooks-svgdrawingstars171 - SVG Drawing with React hooks
    • Data Managing
  • ReSubstars602 - A library for writing better React components and data stores
  • RxDBstars15.6k - A realtime Database for JavaScript Applications
    • Maps
  • react-googlemapsstars218 - React interface to Google maps
  • react-mapsstars43 - A map component for React
  • react-google-mapsstars4.4k - React.js Google Maps integration component
  • react-gmapsstars311 - A Google Maps component for React.js
  • react-map-glstars5.9k - A React wrapper for MapboxGL-js plus overlay API
  • google-map-reactstars5k - Isomorphic google map React component
  • react-mapbox-glstars1.6k - A mapbox-gl-js wrapper to make the API react friendly
  • react-leaflet - React components for Leaflet maps
  • react-geostars225 - A set of geo-related components using react, antd, and ol
  • pigeon-mapsstars3.1k - ReactJS maps without external dependencies

    • React Native Boilerplates

  • Ignitestars12.4k - The hottest CLI for React Native, boilerplates, plugins, generators, and more!

    • React Native Awesome Components

  • react-native-social-sharestars406 - Use the iOS and Android native Twitter and Facebook share popup with React Native
  • react-native-fbsdkstars3k - A wrapper around the iOS Facebook SDK
  • react-native-side-menustars2.2k - Simple customizable component to create side menu
  • react-native-mapbox-glstars2.1k - A Mapbox GL react native module
  • react-native-iconsstars1.2k - Quick and easy icons in React Native
  • react-native-vector-iconsstars14.8k - 3000 Customizable Icons for React Native with support for NavBar/TabBar
  • react-native-google-signinstars2.2k - Google Signin for React Native
  • react-native-fast-imagestars5.8k - FastImage, performant React Native image component

    • Redux Tools

  • redux-toolkitstars5.4k - The official, opinionated, batteries-included toolset for efficient Redux development
  • redux-observablestars7.6k - RxJS middleware for Redux
  • redux-undostars2.7k - Higher order reducer to add undo/redo functionality to redux state containers

    • GraphQL Implementations

  • graphql-phpstars4k - A PHP port of GraphQL reference implementation
  • graphql-dotnetstars4.8k - GraphQL for .NET

    • Relay Tutorials

  • Official Relay Getting Started

    • Relay Tools

  • graphql-relay-jsstars1.4k - A library to help construct a graphql-js server supporting react-relay
  • react-router-relaystars562 - Relay integration for React Router
  • relay-local-schemastars249 - Use Relay without a GraphQL server
  • relay-codemodstars6.4k - Codemod scripts based for on jsodeshift to update Relay APIs

item.title: enaqx/awesome-react May 4th - May 10th, 2020
item.description:
React Awesome Components
  • react-searchbox-awesomestars10 - Minimalistic searchbox
  • react-beautiful-dndstars23.6k - Beautiful and accessible drag and drop for lists with React
    • React Component Libraries
  • rebassstars7.3k - React primitive UI components built with styled-system
    • React Frameworks
  • remix - Finally, a killer React framework from the creators of React Router
    • React Styling
  • aphroditestars5.2k - Framework-agnostic CSS-in-JS with support for server-side rendering, browser prefixing, and minimum CSS generation
    • React Routing
  • reachstars6.8k - Next Generation Routing for React

    • React Native Awesome Components

  • react-native-gifted-chatstars10.5k - The most complete chat UI for React Native
  • recyclerlistviewstars3.6k - High performance listview for React Native and web!
  • react-native-largeliststars2k - The best large list component for React Native
  • react-native-gesture-handlerstars4k - Declarative API exposing platform native touch and gesture system to React Native
  • rn-placeholderstars1.8k - Display some placeholder stuff before rendering your text or media content in React Native

    • React Native Libraries

  • sentry-react-nativestars1.1k - Real-time crash reporting for your web apps, mobile apps, and games.
  • realm-jsstars4.4k - Realm is a mobile database: an alternative to SQLite & key-value stores
  • react-native-device-infostars5.3k - Device Information for React Native iOS and Android

item.description:
React Development Tools
  • react-devtoolsstars11k - Inspection of React component hierarchy in the Chrome and Firefox Developer Tools
  • react-hot-loaderstars12k - Tweak React components in real time
  • react-loadablestars15.9k - A higher order component for loading components with promises

  • storybookstars61.6k - UI component dev & test
  • react-styleguidiststars9.8k - Isolated React component development environment with a living style guide
  • react-cosmosstars6.9k - Dev tool for creating reusable React components
  • eslint-plugin-reactstars7k - React specific linting rules for ESLint
    • React Frameworks
  • gatsby.jsstars50.2k - Free and open source framework based on React
    • React Styling
  • styled-componentsstars33.5k - Visual primitives for the component age
  • emotionstars13k - Library designed for writing CSS styles with JavaScript
  • radiumstars7.4k - A toolchain for React component styling
  • jssstars6.3k - Authoring tool for CSS
    • React Routing
  • react-routerstars43.2k - Declarative routing for React
  • navistars2.1k - Declarative, asynchronous routing for React
  • curistars262 - JavaScript router for single-page applications
